description: Confirm the pre-vendored Mermaid runtime already present at src/Charter.Core/assets/mermaid.min.js (Mermaid v11.16.0, MIT - do NOT fetch, replace, truncate, or needsHuman it) and embed it so a rendered :::diagram opens standalone (invariant 1 - portable artifact): add an <EmbeddedResource> to Charter.Core.csproj with LogicalName Charter.Core.mermaid.min.js, and add a MermaidResource.cs loader (mirroring Charter.Server.SdkResource) that reads the embedded library back so CharterRenderer can INLINE it into the artifact - NOT a CDN <script src>.
